provider: Max Planck Institute for Intelligent Systems
title: AI Incubator
description: AI Incubator is a startup support or accelerator program from Max Planck Institute for Intelligent Systems for teams building artificial-intelligence products or infrastructure.
eligibility: AI startups must satisfy the current product focus, company stage, geography, technical, and selection requirements.
value: AI technical support, mentoring, ecosystem access, and program-specific credits or funding
